word: G4874 - συναναμίγνυμι - synanamígnymi - soon-an-am-ig'-noo-mee - Have company with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Have company with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to mix up together; to keep company with, be intimate with
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and a compound of G303 and G3396; to mix up together, that is, (figuratively) associate with: - (have, keep) company (with).
